name: app-automation
description: Automate iOS Simulator and macOS apps with baepsae MCP tooling.

interface.shortDescription: Automate iOS Simulator and macOS apps
interface.longDescription: Inspect UI trees, interact with simulator or macOS apps, capture screenshots, and run repeatable automation flows with baepsae.
defaultPrompt: Analyze the current simulator UI tree and tell me what is visible.
Launch the app in the booted simulator and capture a screenshot.
Automate a login flow and report where it fails.
